title: Seo's Blazes Reimagined x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that reimagines Blazes with Fresh Animations and new variants!
body:
# ![Blazes Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61c119c05f5f8f059a27ce86279bb2e28db7bc5e.png)

This pack reimagines Blazes with biome-based designs, featuring 50+ variants (including renamables), Fresh Animations by FreshLX, custom animations, and animated flame and magma effects.
